brand.name: Vergent
brand.tagline: Architecting the Digital Landscape of Tomorrow

ribbon.text: V/ergent — deep security checks across SAP, Oracle, Dynamics 365, NetSuite, Sage, AWS and Azure.

productsIntro: Beyond consulting engagements, Vergent ships its own software under the V/ergent name — built for the audit, security, and assurance work our clients face every quarter.

products.title: ERP & cloud audit platform
products.summary: Continuous configuration and security audit for SAP S/4HANA, Oracle Fusion, Dynamics 365, NetSuite, Sage Intacct, Sage X3, AWS, and Azure. 520+ checks, live connectors, defensible reports.

products.title: Multi-framework cyber assurance
products.summary: Walk through every control in ISO 27001, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, NCSC CAF, DORA, NIS2, and 12 more — with evidence storage, scoring rules, and audit-ready exports.

products.title: Banking compliance & operations
products.summary: Risk, compliance, and operations tooling tailored for financial institutions across East Africa and the Gulf.

products.title: Oracle compliance defence platform
products.summary: Independent Oracle LMS compliance engine. Applies your contract logic, filters innocent usage, and produces a defensible liability number you can negotiate against — not Oracle's inflated opening position.

products.title: SAP Business One licence optimisation
products.summary: Scores every SAP B1 user by activity, then recommends downgrade, exchange, or retire — validated against your actual contract before anything is approved. PDF and XLSX reports ready for your renewal conversation.
